home_hero_subtitle: SvelteKit frontend + Moleculer backend, wired through an auto-generated OpenAPI 3.1 contract. End-to-end typed: every request body, response shape, and error variant is validated.
home_wavemap_item_openapi: OpenAPI 3.1 contract auto-generated from typia types
home_wavemap_item_round_trip: Ingest + search round-trip with vector similarity
ingest_page_subtitle: Submit a document to the backend ingest pipeline. The text is chunked, embedded via Ollama, and persisted with pgvector indexing.
ingest_form_doc_id_hint: Stable identifier — re-ingesting the same id replaces prior chunks.
upload_section_subtitle: Drag a .txt or .md file (≤ 10 MiB) onto the dropzone. Progress and live ingest events appear below.
upload_dropzone_idle: Drag & drop here, or click to pick a file
upload_dropzone_picking: Click to pick a file (.txt or .md)
upload_validation_wrong_type: Only plain text files are accepted in this slice.
sse_panel_empty: Waiting for the upload to begin…
search_page_subtitle: Cosine-similarity search over ingested chunks. The backend embeds the query and returns the top hits per tenant, ordered by similarity.
search_empty_state: No matches found. Try ingesting documents from the Ingest page first.
docs_page_subtitle: Static demo list (Wave 9). The real listing endpoint lands in Wave 10 — this page will swap its data source without visual changes.
admin_content_page_subtitle: Documents ingested into the demo tenant. Soft-delete is irreversible from this UI — restore via the backend.
admin_content_delete_confirm: Delete this document? This cannot be undone from here.
admin_content_empty: No documents yet. Ingest one from the Ingest page.
